summary: CAD enrichment backend testing complete. 10/10 new CAD tests passed plus 22/22 regression tests from iteration 1 — total 32/32. Verified GET /api/cad/sources, POST /api/properties/{id}/cad-enrich, POST /api/cad/bulk-enrich, the CAD overlay on all 36 seeded properties (Hill deed refs from PDF, McLennan year_built/sqft/appraised_value, Bosque appraised_value), cad_search_url auto-population, and the extended Property model schema. Live Playwright CAD scraping is best-effort; cad-enrich endpoint always returns 200 with cad_search_url, cad_data_source, cad_enriched_at as designed even when the BIS Consultants eSearch yields no live data.

minor.issue: Iterates Playwright launches serially in the request thread. For a county with 15 properties this can take ~3 minutes - risk of ingress timeout on large counties. Consider background ScrapeJob pattern.
On exception per-property, only `failed` is incremented; the URL/source/timestamp the helper would have produced is also dropped. Consider still saving the search URL even on failure.
From iteration 1 still applies: missing-auth returns 403 not 401 (HTTPBearer default). Cosmetic.

action_items: Consider moving /api/cad/bulk-enrich behind a ScrapeJob/background task to avoid long-running synchronous Playwright loops on bigger counties.
On per-property bulk-enrich failure, still upsert cad_search_url + cad_data_source so users can verify in browser even when live fetch errors.
Carry-over from iteration 1: derive new_this_week from scraped_at; switch deprecated on_event hooks to lifespan; widen DataSource Literal (now a free-form str — fixed since iteration 1).
critical_code_review_comments: cad_scrapers.cad_url_for() strips the street number and uses just the longest token (e.g. '919 E Dee St' -> 'Dee') — this can produce ambiguous CAD searches in cities with many similarly-named streets. Consider preserving the street_number alongside the StreetName param when both available, e.g. StreetNumber=919&StreetName=Dee.

cad_scrapers._live_cad_fetch hard-codes executable_path='/root/bin/chromium' with a try/except fallback — fine for now, but should come from an env var or use playwright's default to avoid surprise failures across environments.
cad_overlay.CAD_OVERLAY couples test/seed data with production code; OK for MVP but should move to seed_data.py or a JSON asset to prevent drift.

cad_scrapers._parse_cad_detail_text regex for 'Market Value' will also match 'Land Market Value' first and stop early — appraised_value might be assigned the wrong field for some CAD layouts. Consider anchored / negative-lookahead patterns.
test_credentials: Uses dynamic tester+<uuid>@lien.tx for auth fixtures; CAD tests do not require auth.
seed_data_creation: Relies on existing 36-property seed (Hill=12, Bosque=9, McLennan=15) now augmented with CAD overlay fields. No new seed data created by tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` to execute both backend_test.py (22) and test_cad.py (10). CAD live enrichment uses Playwright (~5s per property in headless mode) and is best-effort — anti-bot on BIS Consultants eSearch may prevent fresh data, but endpoints always return 200 with cad_search_url/cad_data_source/cad_enriched_at. The bulk-enrich test uses Bosque County (9 props) intentionally to stay under timeout; do not switch it to a larger county without raising the timeout.
